violations.claim: VIOLATION: "Initializing in X" claims initialization is proceeding,
violations.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: [NEW]
; LINE: 55
; VIOLATION: "Initializing in X" claims initialization is proceeding,
; but isGitRepo() is not checked until lines 59-62.
; If the directory is not a git repo, exit(1) fires after this log was already printed.
(declare-const is_git_repo Int)       ; 1 = valid git repo, 0 = not
(declare-const init_msg_printed Int)  ; 1 = "Initializing in X" printed
(declare-const exited_line61 Int)     ; 1 = process.exit(1) called
; Code transition: line 55 prints unconditionally — no git check precedes it
(assert (= init_msg_printed 1))
; Code transition: if !isGitRepo() → process.exit(1) at line 61
(assert (=> (= is_git_repo 0) (= exited_line61 1)))
; Violation: "Initializing" printed, then process aborted — claim was false
(assert (= is_git_repo 0))
(assert (= init_msg_printed 1))
(assert (= exited_line61 1))
(check-sat)
